name: Inzektor Orb
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲虫装機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>インゼクター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝珠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オーブ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up "Inzektor" monster you control; equip this card to that target. It gains 500 ATK and DEF. When exactly 1 "Inzektor" monster you control is targeted by a card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can send this Equip Card to the Graveyard; negate that effect.
eff: Target 1 face-up "Inzektor" monster you control; equip this card to that target. It gains 500 ATK and DEF. When exactly 1 "Inzektor" monster you control is targeted by a card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can send this Equip Card to the Graveyard; negate that effect.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
